mapper.select: select user_id from users where user_id in order by user_id for update

select distinct referenced_users.user_id from ( select created_by_user_id as user_id from application_workspace_versions union all select user_id from personal_workspaces union all select user_id from opencode_server_processes union all select user_id from user_opencode_process_bindings union all select owner_user_id from scheduled_task_plans union all select requested_by_user_id from scheduled_task_runs where requested_by_user_id is not null union all select stop_requested_by_user_id from scheduled_task_runs where stop_requested_by_user_id is not null union all select created_by_user_id from sessions where created_by_user_id is not null union all select triggered_by_user_id from runs where triggered_by_user_id is not null union all select sender_user_id from session_messages where sender_user_id is not null union all select requested_by_user_id from workspace_create_operations union all select created_by_user_id from agent_config_worktrees union all select requested_by_user_id from opencode_process_start_operations union all select credential_user_id from reference_repository_states where credential_user_id is not null union all select owner_user_id from night_execution_tasks union all select owner_user_id from night_execution_session_locks ) referenced_users where referenced_users.user_id in order by referenced_users.user_id
mapper.delete: delete from analytics_user_activity_hourly where user_id in
delete from analytics_user_activity_daily where user_id in
delete from ai_message_feedbacks where user_id in
delete from workspace_sync_records where user_id in
delete from user_workspace_branch_preferences where user_id in
delete from user_application_workspace_preferences where user_id in
delete from user_global_workspace_preferences where user_id in
delete from user_ssh_keys where user_id in
delete from application_members where user_id in
delete from user_login_logs where user_id in
delete from user_roles where user_id in
delete from users where user_id in
